mapper.select: SELECT n.*, f.file_url, mc.cd_kor AS mainCategory, sc.cd_kor AS subCategory FROM tbl_news n LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = 100 LEFT JOIN tbl_codeinfo mc ON n.main_category_cd = mc.cd LEFT JOIN tbl_codeinfo sc ON n.sub_category_cd = sc.cd WHERE n.main_category_cd = #{mainCategoryCd} AND (n.news_type IS NULL OR n.news_type NOT IN ('단독', '속보')) ORDER BY n.news_id DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.*, f.file_url FROM tbl_news n LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = 100 WHERE n.news_type IN ('단독', '속보') ORDER BY n.news_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS important_news
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.*, f.file_url FROM tbl_news n LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = 100 ORDER BY n.news_id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS latest_news LIMIT 1

SELECT n.*, f.file_url FROM tbl_news n LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = 100 WHERE n.main_category_cd IN ( SELECT cd FROM tbl_codeinfo WHERE parent_cd = 'MAIN_CATEGORY_CD' )
AND n.main_category_cd NOT IN
#{category}
AND (n.news_type IS NULL OR n.news_type NOT IN ('단독', '속보')) ORDER BY n.news_id DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT n.*, f.file_url FROM tbl_news n LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = 100 WHERE n.credate_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
AND n.main_category_cd NOT IN
#{category}
ORDER BY n.view_count DESC, n.credate_dt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT n.*, f.file_url FROM tbl_news n LEFT JOIN tbl_file f ON n.news_id = f.file_ref_id AND f.file_gbn_cd = 100 WHERE n.credate_dt >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
AND n.main_category_cd NOT IN
#{category}
ORDER BY n.credate_dt ASC LIMIT 10
